page_metadata.biotools__summary: Comprehensive package to automatically train and validate a multi-class SVM classifier based on gene expression data. Provides transparent selection of gene markers, their coexpression networks, and an interface to query the classifier.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Comprehensive package to automatically train and validate a multi-class SVM classifier based on gene expression data. Provides transparent selection of gene markers, their coexpression networks, and an interface to query the classifier.
